text_raw: Hey, calm down.
text_clean: Hey, calm down.

text_raw: That actually happened?
text_clean: That actually happened?

text_raw: Can you find out anything else?
text_clean: Can you find out anything else?

text_raw: I'll bring you more food if you do.
text_clean: I'll bring you more food if you do.

text_raw: It's not just any man who can end up in Halssius...
text_clean: It's not just any man who can end up in Halssius...

text_raw: There's only one troublemaker I can think of up to the task.
text_clean: There's only one troublemaker I can think of up to the task.

text_raw: Gotta tell {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Kliff#Kliff}.
text_clean: Gotta tell {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Kliff#Kliff}.

text_raw: Drinking and fighting... I'd bet my arse it's that hothead.
text_clean: Drinking and fighting... I'd bet my arse it's that hothead.

text_raw: {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Kliff#Kliff}!
text_clean: {Staticinfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Kliff#Kliff}!

text_raw: I think I've located our {StaticInfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Yann#loveable rabblerouser}.
text_clean: I think I've located our {StaticInfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Yann#loveable rabblerouser}.

text_raw: I'm still looking into it,
text_clean: I'm still looking into it,

text_raw: but if my information's to be believed, he's likely at Halssius.
text_clean: but if my information's to be believed, he's likely at Halssius.

text_raw: Seems like he's causing some commotion there.
text_clean: Seems like he's causing some commotion there.

text_raw: My gut also tells me it's {StaticInfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Yann#Yann}.
text_clean: My gut also tells me it's {StaticInfo:Knowledge:Knowledge_Yann#Yann}.

text_raw: Careful. I heard the wardens are strict and won't let anyone in.
text_clean: Careful. I heard the wardens are strict and won't let anyone in.

text_raw: Only an overseer or those granted a permit can enter...
text_clean: Only an overseer or those granted a permit can enter...

text_raw: I know you can handle yourself, but...
text_clean: I know you can handle yourself, but...

text_raw: Best to keep your head down, Kliff.
text_clean: Best to keep your head down, Kliff.

text_raw: Nah, just a raving lunatic.
text_clean: Nah, just a raving lunatic.

text_raw: Some drunk bastard beat a priest half to death at Halssius.
text_clean: Some drunk bastard beat a priest half to death at Halssius.

text_raw: That's why he's saying he's a madman.
text_clean: That's why he's saying he's a madman.

text_raw: That fool's a Greymane?
text_clean: That fool's a Greymane?

text_raw: If I trusted everything you said, I'd be dead in a ditch.
text_clean: If I trusted everything you said, I'd be dead in a ditch.

text_raw: Marius, over there.
text_clean: Marius, over there.

text_raw: I swear he said he was a Greymane.
text_clean: I swear he said he was a Greymane.

text_raw: Who asked you to butt in?
text_clean: Who asked you to butt in?

text_raw: Shut up and let him talk.
text_clean: Shut up and let him talk.

text_raw: I'm telling you the truth! Why won't you believe me?
text_clean: I'm telling you the truth! Why won't you believe me?

text_raw: Everything alright?
text_clean: Everything alright?

text_raw: Causing trouble somewhere, no doubt.
text_clean: Causing trouble somewhere, no doubt.

text_raw: Only Yann could upset a madhouse.
text_clean: Only Yann could upset a madhouse.

text_raw: I'll go check.
text_clean: I'll go check.
